prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image PIXEL-FAITHFULLY — same two hands squeezing the diamond-gem-silhouette heat pack (5-sided cut-gem profile), same hand poses, same finger positions, same clear/transparent pack with crimped edges, same oval-outline activation object pressed by a thumb through the plastic, same composition, same framing, same pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line-art style, same line weight.

MANDATORY MODIFICATION — COMPLETELY ERASE the current logo on the heat pack. The current logo is broken: it shows 'DIALED' stacked directly on top of 'HEALTH' (both words centered, one directly above the other), with a small heartbeat-spike squiggle drawn next to 'DIALED'. THIS IS WRONG and must be removed.

REDRAW the logo from scratch in the same area of the heat pack, matching the SECOND reference image (the official Dialed Health logo) and the THIRD reference image (the just-fixed step 07 illustration where the logo appears correctly on a heat pack in the same line-art style). The CORRECT layout is:

  - A HORIZONTAL LINE running fully across the logo (left edge to right edge of the logo's footprint). This is the central spine of the logo.
  - In the MIDDLE of this horizontal line: a single EKG/heartbeat SPIKE — the line briefly dips DOWN into a small V valley, then sharply jumps UP into a tall narrow triangular spike (peak), then dips back DOWN into another small V valley, then resumes as the horizontal line.
  - 'DIALED' in BOLD sans-serif capitals, positioned ABOVE the horizontal line and to the LEFT of the EKG spike. Its baseline sits ON the horizontal line. So DIALED is in the TOP-LEFT quadrant of the logo.
  - 'HEALTH' in LIGHTER-WEIGHT sans-serif capitals (thinner strokes, slightly more letter-spacing than DIALED), positioned BELOW the horizontal line and to the RIGHT of the EKG spike. Its top edge touches the underside of the horizontal line. So HEALTH is in the BOTTOM-RIGHT quadrant of the logo.
  - The two words are DIAGONALLY OFFSET across the EKG spike — one upper-left, one lower-right. They are NEVER both centered, NEVER stacked one directly above the other.
  - Logo sits on the heat pack's front face in the upper-center area, scaled proportionally to the available pack space. Clean black ink.

If you keep DIALED and HEALTH stacked vertically with one centered above the other, the result is REJECTED. They MUST be diagonally offset across the heartbeat spike.

Do NOT modify anything else — same hands, same heat pack shape (diamond-gem 5-sided silhouette), same activation oval pressed by thumb, same crimped edges, same composition, same line weight, same white background, same style. Pure black ink line-art on white, no other color. No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/Dialed Health_Logo_Updated-02.png
